description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the rust:latest Docker image and runs a before_script that executes `apt-get update -yqq` followed by `apt-get install -yqq --no-install-recommends build-essential`. Define a job named `test:cargo` in the default test stage that runs the exact commands `rustc --version`, `cargo --version`, and `cargo test --verbose`. The pipeline does not define any services, caches, artifacts, or special rules, so the job runs on every pipeline execution.
